messages.author: Nick
messages.content:
<@&1333894833621827677> Veo que no estoy obteniendo bien ni el token ni el sign, estoy intentando asi: const authRes = await fetch("https://app.afipsdk.com/api/v1/afip/auth", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        "Authorization": Bearer ${process.env.AFIP_ACCESS_TOKEN}
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        environment: "prod",
        tax_id: process.env.AFIP_CUIT,
        wsid: "wsfe",
        cert: (process.env.AFIP_CERT ?? "").replace(/\n/g, "\n"),
        key: (process.env.AFIP_KEY ?? "").replace(/\n/g, "\n"),
      })
    });

    const auth = await authRes.json();
